name: @camera.ui/camera-ui-smtp
description: Efficient SMTP-based motion detection system. Captures and delivers alerts through email services with customizable triggers and seamless integration for continuous monitoring.

scripts.bundle: npm run format && npm run lint:fix && npm run build && cui bundle
scripts.bundle:dev: npm run format && npm run lint:fix && npm run build && cross-env MODE=development cui bundle
scripts.prepublishOnly:
node -e "if(!process.env.SAFE_PUBLISH){console.error('Error: Please use @camera.ui/cli to publish the plugin:
  npm run publish:alpha
  npm run publish:beta
  npm run publish:latest
');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.publish:alpha: npm i --save && npm run bundle && cui publish --alpha
scripts.publish:beta: npm i --save && npm run bundle && cui publish --beta
scripts.publish:latest: npm i --save && npm run bundle && cui publish --latest
